nasb.text: “If a man strikes the eye of his male or female slave, and destroys it, he shall let him go free on account of his eye.

esv.text: “When a man strikes the eye of his slave, male or female, and destroys it, he shall let the slave go free because of his eye.

cnv.text: “如果有人擊打他奴僕的一隻眼，或婢女的一隻眼，把眼打壞了，就要因他的眼的緣故讓他自由離去。

ccb.text: “主人若打坏仆婢的一只眼睛，就要因仆婢眼睛受伤而使仆婢得自由。
